description_long: This bungalow features a modern, geometric design with a prominent barrel-vaulted roof running along its main axis. The exterior walls are finished in a light gray material, and the roof is a muted brown, creating a subtle contrast. A large, covered carport extends from the front, with a driveway leading to a parked blue car. The rear of the bungalow opens to a spacious patio area with a rectangular swimming pool and a poolside lounge chair. Windows are minimal and arranged in a linear pattern, with some grouped on the sides. The overall structure is single-story, with clean lines and a focus on open, functional outdoor space.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a barrel-vaulted roof, light gray walls, a carport, and a backyard swimming pool. The design emphasizes geometric lines and open outdoor living.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the carport, driveway with a blue car, and the main entrance under the barrel-vaulted roof.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the swimming pool, patio area, and the back of the barrel-vaulted roof.
description_view_2: Side-rear view displaying the pool, poolside lounge chair, and the covered patio area.
description_view_3: Direct front view with the driveway, carport, and main entrance clearly visible.
